summary: An ICP/DFINITY-ready React + Motoko project that still includes the “Privacy Matters” landing page and Internet Identity/actor scaffolding, but has expanded into a fuller build template/monorepo-style setup (pnpm workspace + deploy/build scripts) and added a shadcn/ui-based component library scaffold plus additional frontend utilities/hooks for future app features.

existing_features.title: Static Privacy Matters landing page
existing_features.description: Renders a full-screen landing page with a header (shield icon + brand text), centered hero message (“Privacy Matters” + tagline), and a footer attribution line.

existing_features.title: Header social links with icons
existing_features.description: Displays clickable social links in the header using react-icons (X/Twitter and GitHub) with hover color transitions and accessible aria-labels.

existing_features.title: TailwindCSS theming with OKLCH CSS variables
existing_features.description: Defines a tokenized color system (background/foreground, primary/secondary, muted, borders, etc.) using OKLCH CSS variables applied via Tailwind, plus container sizing and radius tokens.

existing_features.title: Simple fade-in animation utility
existing_features.description: Provides a custom fade-in keyframe animation (opacity + translateY) exposed via an .animate-fade-in utility class and applied to the landing hero content.

existing_features.title: Internet Identity authentication context
existing_features.description: Implements Internet Identity login/logout and identity persistence via @dfinity/auth-client, exposing identity, login, clear, and status flags through a React Context and the useInternetIdentity hook.

existing_features.title: Delegation validity checks and long-lived session configuration
existing_features.description: Avoids re-login when a non-anonymous, valid DelegationIdentity is already present; login uses a maxTimeToLive of 30 days (in nanoseconds) and supports derivationOrigin via loaded config.

existing_features.title: Backend actor creation hook with identity-aware caching
existing_features.description: Creates an anonymous or authenticated backend actor depending on whether an identity is available, caches it via React Query keyed by principal, and invalidates/refetches non-actor queries when the actor changes.

existing_features.title: Optional backend access-control initialization support
existing_features.description: After creating the actor, conditionally calls initializeAccessControl() if present; otherwise supports a private _initializeAccessControlWithSecret(secret) method using a secret token pulled from the URL hash/session.

existing_features.title: Secure URL hash secret handling utilities
existing_features.description: Provides helpers to read parameters from query/hash, persist them in sessionStorage, and specifically handle sensitive secrets from hash fragments with automatic URL cleanup to reduce history/referrer leakage.

existing_features.title: React Query client setup
existing_features.description: Initializes a QueryClient and wraps the application with QueryClientProvider to support cached async state (used by the actor hook).

existing_features.title: Placeholder query hook module
existing_features.description: Includes an intentionally empty useQueries module indicating the current landing page does not require backend queries.

existing_features.title: shadcn/ui component library scaffold
existing_features.description: Adds a large set of prebuilt UI components (shadcn/ui-style) under src/components/ui (e.g., dialog, dropdown-menu, form, sidebar, toast/sonner, carousel, etc.) along with supporting utilities for consistent UI building.

existing_features.title: Editor state hook scaffold
existing_features.description: Introduces a dedicated useEditor hook module to support richer interactive/editor-like UI state management in the frontend.

existing_features.title: Storage client utility module
existing_features.description: Adds a StorageClient utility to centralize access to browser storage (e.g., localStorage/sessionStorage) for consistent persistence behavior across the app.

existing_features.title: ICP build-template scaffolding (deploy/build scripts + configs)
existing_features.description: Adds a build-template directory with workspace/package configs and scripts (including image prune/resize helpers) and ICP canister YAMLs to support repeatable project builds and deployments.

existing_features.title: Update the frontend theme styling so the application background renders as red (i.e., the Tailwind `bg-background` color used by the landing page). Apply the change consistently for both light and dark mode so the background remains red regardless of mode.
Ensure foreground text remains readable against the new red background by adjusting theme foreground variables/classes as needed while keeping the background red.

new_feature_requests.summary: Allow configuring the landing page background color (latest request: set to red).

architecturalNotes: React SPA entrypoint wraps the app in @tanstack/react-query’s QueryClientProvider and a custom InternetIdentityProvider context.
Authentication is implemented as a React Context + hook pair (InternetIdentityProvider/useInternetIdentity) using @dfinity/auth-client and DelegationIdentity validity checks.

Backend access is abstracted behind a “create actor” hook (useActor) that uses React Query caching keyed by principal, and supports optional access-control initialization methods if present on the actor.
URL parameter utilities include secure handling for sensitive parameters via hash-fragment extraction with automatic URL cleanup and sessionStorage persistence.
TailwindCSS theme is driven by CSS variables using OKLCH color values; dark mode is class-based and currently mirrors the light palette for consistent appearance.
Frontend currently follows a ‘static landing page’ approach (explicitly no query hooks used on the landing page), while keeping ICP integration scaffolding in place for future features.
Project now includes a build-template scaffold (Dockerfile, deploy scripts, icp.yaml, pnpm workspace config) intended for repeatable ICP project builds/deploys.
Frontend now includes a shadcn/ui-style component library (many UI primitives in src/components/ui) supported by shared utils and hooks (e.g., use-mobile).
A StorageClient utility module has been introduced to centralize browser storage access patterns.
An additional useEditor hook module has been added as scaffolding for richer interactive/editor features.
knownIssues: The Motoko backend (backend/main.mo) is an empty actor; any frontend actor calls beyond initialization will fail once invoked unless a real canister interface is implemented/deployed.

useActor calls _initializeAccessControlWithSecret with an empty string when no caffeineAdminToken is present; depending on backend implementation this could cause unnecessary failed calls or unintended behavior.

InternetIdentityProvider sets loginStatus to 'idle' after initialization even when an identity is loaded; consumers must rely on the presence of identity rather than status to detect authenticated state.
urlParams utilities rely on window/sessionStorage and will not work in SSR/non-browser environments without guards (acceptable for this SPA).
Landing page external links point to generic https://twitter.com and https://github.com rather than project-specific accounts.
Large shadcn/ui component scaffold may include many currently-unused components, potentially increasing repository size and maintenance overhead until actively leveraged.
Intermittent build/deployment failure occurred during a background color change deployment (deployment error reported after attempting to set background to black).
